inputs.name: SendGrid return path CNAME hostname
inputs.instructions: In the SendGrid dashboard, go to Settings > Sender Authentication > Domain Authentication and copy the HOST name for the return path CNAME record (e.g. em1234.yourdomain.com).

inputs.name: SendGrid return path CNAME value
inputs.instructions: In the SendGrid dashboard, copy the VALUE for the return path CNAME record (e.g. u12345.wl123.sendgrid.net).

inputs.name: DKIM CNAME 1 value
inputs.instructions: In the SendGrid dashboard, copy the VALUE for the 's1._domainkey' CNAME record.

inputs.name: DKIM CNAME 2 value
inputs.instructions: In the SendGrid dashboard, copy the VALUE for the 's2._domainkey' CNAME record.
